text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe clinches a crucial victory at the
Arima Kinen, but the fight is far from over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm positive that we'll be seeing more of Agnes
Tachyon in our races to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's friend is an entity that evolves
further the more ambitious she gets. This friend of
hers is essentially a manifestation of Manhattan
Cafe's own aspirations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe tells me that her friend got faster
as I helped her improve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make a heartfelt promise to continue
pursuing our ambitions together.
